subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thy letter hath attained unto Our presence in this Most Great Prison, from whence We call upon God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک بما حضر کتابک تلقاء الوجه فی هذا السجن العظیم من یدعو الله بعد ورود
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @living waters; water of life
